expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: search box selector dropdown planning covers OK or Cancel confirmation, pending selection, and dismissal outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the verdict and alignment sections explicitly cover all three focus areas: “OK confirmation vs Cancel behavior”, “Pending selection/loading states”, and “Dismissal outcomes”. It further lists a checklist requiring scenarios for “Confirm with OK”, “Cancel”, and “Dismissal during pending load”.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly framed as “Verdict (phase_contract / advisory)” and repeatedly anchors expectations to Phase 4a (e.g., “Evidence-to-Phase4a Alignment” and “Phase 4a Contract Fit”), stating Phase 4a requires “subcategory-only draft” with “scenario + atomic action chain + observable verification leaves.” execution_notes.md also states: “this benchmark targets phase4a contract alignment only (advisory).”
